classificationPolicy.IMPLEMENTED_AND_VERIFIED: Implementation, persistent authority, automated tests and a CI workflow are present.
classificationPolicy.IMPLEMENTED_NOT_VERIFIED: Implementation exists, but the required production-like target has not been measured.
classificationPolicy.PARTIAL: Only part of the required capability or proof is present.
classificationPolicy.FAIL_CLOSED: The capability is deliberately unavailable until a trusted dependency exists.
classificationPolicy.MOCK_ONLY: Only a sandbox, adapter contract or simulated dependency exists.
classificationPolicy.LEGACY: Retired behavior still affects repository or release state.
classificationPolicy.DUPLICATE_AUTHORITY: More than one mutable source of truth is reachable in one release mode.
classificationPolicy.OUT_OF_RELEASE_SCOPE: Explicitly excluded from this technical release program.

capabilities.name: Release status and obsolete deploy integrations
capabilities.finding: Main still receives failed Deno and Vercel statuses although those contours are not release authorities.
capabilities.nextGate: Disable obsolete status publishers and verify a clean exact-head combined status.

capabilities.name: Persistent authentication and sessions
capabilities.finding: Persistent sessions, one-time refresh rotation, revocation and MFA have PostgreSQL-backed CI evidence.
capabilities.nextGate: Retain this as a blocking release gate.

capabilities.name: Membership RBAC and tenant isolation
capabilities.finding: The canonical transaction path resolves role and tenant from server authority and runs the twelve-role scenario under RLS.
capabilities.nextGate: Expand the negative matrix to every public command endpoint.

capabilities.name: Canonical Deal command core
capabilities.finding: Business state, audit, outbox, idempotency and money effects use the canonical PostgreSQL command path with version CAS.
capabilities.nextGate: Prove every remaining write endpoint uses this authority or fails closed.

capabilities.name: Auction execution and atomic award
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL read authority; command proof incomplete
capabilities.finding: PostgreSQL lot, bid and award state exists, but a dedicated concurrent bid, close and unique-winner suite is absent.
capabilities.nextGate: Add idempotent bid and close commands, deterministic tie-break, two-closer race and worker-restart proof.

capabilities.name: Logistics and acceptance lifecycle
capabilities.finding: The lifecycle persists assignment, transit, arrival, weight and acceptance, but overlap and replacement race proofs are incomplete.
capabilities.nextGate: Add assignment conflict, driver overlap, carrier replacement and duplicate-arrival tests.

capabilities.name: Laboratory lifecycle and evidence binding
capabilities.finding: Laboratory state is persisted and exercised by PostgreSQL authority and full Deal lifecycle tests.
capabilities.nextGate: Retain supersede and evidence-hash invariants as blocking checks.

capabilities.name: Documents and immutable evidence
capabilities.authority: Durable metadata; external object immutability unproven
capabilities.finding: Evidence metadata exists, but Object Lock, antivirus, signed URL isolation, retention and object restore are not proven.
capabilities.nextGate: Implement and test immutable object storage, upload validation, tombstones, download audit and restore reconciliation.

capabilities.name: Settlement ledger and callbacks
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL append-only ledger and callback registry
capabilities.finding: Internal reserve and release use integer minor units, signed idempotent callbacks, append-only ledger and reconciliation.
capabilities.nextGate: Keep provider status non-live until external credentials and acceptance exist.

capabilities.name: Dispute and money freeze lifecycle
capabilities.finding: Dispute persistence exists, but partial dispute, freeze, superseding decision and release or refund are not fully gated.
capabilities.nextGate: Add complete positive and negative dispute lifecycle evidence.

capabilities.name: Atomic audit and durable outbox
capabilities.finding: Atomic coupling, append-only history, lease, retry, dead-letter and multi-worker recovery are covered by the industrial core gate.
capabilities.nextGate: Add poison-message isolation and backlog recovery evidence.

capabilities.name: Logs metrics traces alerts and business monitoring
capabilities.finding: An observability E2E exists, but complete trace propagation, redaction and production alert routing are not accepted.
capabilities.nextGate: Prove request-to-worker-to-callback traces and executable technical and business alerts.

capabilities.name: Target load profile
capabilities.finding: Concurrency proof exists, but 5000 sessions, 500 RPS sustained, 1000 RPS burst, 50000 deals and 10 million events are unmeasured.
capabilities.nextGate: Run the full production-like load suite and retain raw before and after evidence.

capabilities.name: Fault injection and recovery invariants
capabilities.finding: Worker recovery is tested, but API termination, database failover, storage timeout, pool exhaustion and restart under load are incomplete.
capabilities.nextGate: Create deterministic fault scenarios with post-failure invariant verification.

capabilities.name: Backup restore and disaster recovery
capabilities.finding: Database restore evidence exists, but encrypted retention, object recovery, regional topology and measured RPO or RTO do not.
capabilities.nextGate: Run isolated production-like restore drills and record measured RPO and RTO.

capabilities.name: Blocking security gates
capabilities.finding: SAST, Trivy and performance steps tolerate failures, so the current workflow does not enforce the declared Critical and High policy.
capabilities.nextGate: Make required scans blocking and add IaC, API fuzz, callback replay and tenant escape gates.

capabilities.name: Production-like infrastructure and deployment
capabilities.finding: No API Dockerfile exists; immutable image build, build-once promotion, schema compatibility and rollback acceptance are not proven.
capabilities.nextGate: Add production-like IaC, immutable image build, migration gate, smoke, rollback and artifact digest evidence.

capabilities.name: Browser i18n and accessibility acceptance
capabilities.finding: The Design System v8 browser and accessibility matrix is merged without claiming production operation.
capabilities.nextGate: Keep it blocking and add command-conflict UX scenarios.

capabilities.name: Live external integrations
capabilities.finding: Adapter contracts and sandbox paths exist; live credentials, connectivity and provider acceptance are external gates.
capabilities.nextGate: Keep unavailable adapters fail closed and execute provider acceptance only after access is granted.

capabilities.name: Commit-bound release evidence
capabilities.finding: Evidence artifacts exist, but no single manifest binds JUnit, scans, load, RPO or RTO, container and deployment digests to exact head.
capabilities.nextGate: Generate a machine-readable release evidence index keyed by commit, environment and immutable artifact digest.
